candidates.theme: G7 Synchronized Rate Hold — Hormuz Energy Shock Locks All Major Central Banks Into Monetary Paralysis Simultaneously
candidates.news_one_liner: BOJ breaks from its dovish outlier role with a hawkish pivot, leaving zero accommodative anchors in the G7 and adding yen-carry unwind risk to an already complex monetary paralysis picture.
